name: code-monitor
description: Watch for new commits matching Sourcegraph search queries and send alerts via webhooks

--query.description: Sourcegraph search query (should include type:diff or type:commit)

--webhook.description: Webhook URL to POST alerts to (e.g., Slack incoming webhook)

--interval.description: Check interval in minutes (default: 15, informational — actual scheduling is external)

check.description: Run a check for a specific monitor or all monitors

--name.description: Specific monitor to check (if omitted, checks all)

--since.description: Override 'since' time in ISO8601 format (default: last check time from DB)

check-all.description: Run checks for all active monitors

list.description: List all monitors with their status

name.description: Name of the monitor to delete

history.description: Show recent alerts for a monitor

--limit.description: Maximum number of results to show (default: 20)

health.description: Check Sourcegraph connectivity and database state
